titleStmt.title: SII 41.390: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 390. (A.R. No. 605 of 1905.) Tiṅgaḷūr, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the east and the north bases of the central shrine in the Chandramaulīśvara temple at Tingaḷūr.

summary.p: Records king's gift of the village of Tēraiyūr alias Kulōttunga-Chōḻanallūr in Kuṟuppu-nāḍu to the temple of Chandrapurīśvaramuḍaiyār at Tiṅgaḷūr in the same nāḍu. All the taxes (nanchey punchey puravu, siddāyam, elavai, ugavai, maṉṟupāḍu, teṇḍakuṟṟam, chīkāriyappēṟu, adikārappēṟu, etc.) from the village were given to the temple. The officer Chōḻamāṇikka-mūvēndavēḷān signed the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Etada viśvamahipāla maulimālāvi bhūṣaṇam śrīkulottuṅga coḷasya sārvvabhaumasya śāsanam . koṉerinmaikoṇṭān kuṟuppuṉāṭṭut tiṅkaḷūr Āḷuṭaiyār cantirapuriśvaramuṭaiyār tevarkaṉmikaḷukku nammolai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Ittevaṟku Amutupaṭi
tuppaṭi pūccuppaṭikkum tiruppaṇi ceyvikkaikkum nāṅkuṭutta Ūr Innāṭṭu teraiyūrāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻanallūreṉṟu Ūreṟṟit tevartāṉamāyiṭuvatākavum Ivūril kuḷamuḷḷaṉavum Aṭaittu Ivar naṉcey puṉcey puravu cittāyam Elavai Ukavai maṉṟupāṭu teṇṭa kuṟṟam ci
kāriyappeṟu Atikārappeṟu nañcivikaiyār nantūtar taḻaiyiṭuvārpeṟum naṅkarumañ colluvār pāṇar puravukaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭutūm Ittevaṟkut tiruppaṇikku Uṭalāvatāka kaṭavatākavum Uttaraayaṉattile Utakapūrvamāka Iccātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ippaṭik kallilu cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷāka cantirā
tittavarai celvatāka nammolai kuṭuttom Ivvūr veṭṭi muṭṭaiāḷ Ittevaṟku veṇṭum tiruppaṇi ceyvutāka kuṭuttom Itu nantamar Uḷḷār pāṟpaṭuttuk kuṭukka Ivai coḻakulamāṇikka muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.390 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
